steps.summary: Opened docs/horizons/real-anonymized-transaction-poc.md, docs/plans/2026-07-05-real-anonymized-transaction-poc.md, and phases/real-anonymized-transaction-poc with RA1~RA4. ROADMAP/OBJECTIVE were moved to active real-anonymized-transaction-poc.

Added kifrs/feedback/transaction_poc.py and tests/test_real_transaction_poc.py. The adapter validates public-safe case intake, converts KIFRS1116 structured facts into Lease1116, generates the existing 1116 review pack, and converts reviewer correction into a feedback queue record. Verification: python -m pytest tests/test_real_transaction_poc.py -q -> 5 passed with existing pytest cache warning.

Added scripts/real_transaction_poc.py and generated docs/reports/real-transaction-poc/. The package contains INDEX.md, anonymized-input-card.md, review-pack.md, feedback-queue.jsonl, feedback-queue-report.md, and package-manifest.json.

Closed real-anonymized-transaction-poc with docs/reports/2026-07-05-ra4-real-transaction-poc-close-report.md. Focused tests passed 21, sample package regenerated, quality_preflight ok/public_safe True, and git diff --check produced only LF->CRLF warnings.
